economic_notes: Sk'atsin Resources Ltd. and Sk'atsin Resources Limited Liability Partnership engaged in resource and economic development. Band holds 99% of partnership units in Sk'atsin Resources LLP. Also has interest in BC First Nations Revenue Share Limited Partnership (0.45%) and Sexqeltkemc Limited Partnership (33%). Sk'atsin Silvatech Ventures LLP is a related entity in which Sk'atsin Resources LLP holds shared control.
notes: Fiscal year is 2021 (year ended March 31, 2021). Two entities accounted for by modified equity method: Sk'atsin Resources Ltd. and Sk'atsin Resources Limited Liability Partnership. Total government transfers calculated as ISC ($4,654,474) + FNHA ($586,852) + FNESC ($748,813) + Province of BC ($2,590,083) + CMHC ($77,114) = $8,657,336; however FNESC may be considered a government transfer — included. Long-term debt = demand loans ($365,000) + mortgages payable ($456,630) + promissory note payable ($2,246,463) = $3,068,093; current portions included. Net financial assets of $9,512,877 per statement. Prior auditor was Daley & Company CPA LLP; partners joined Grant Thornton LLP on January 4, 2021. No schedule of remuneration provided in the extracted text. OSR calculated as total revenue minus all government transfers.
